qa_pair.question: How many tools does the github-repo-config MCP server expose? Answer with just the number.
What field must equal "branch" for delete_branch_protection to succeed, instead of throwing before any API call?
What error code do delete_branch_protection and set_repo_custom_properties throw when their confirm-echo field doesn't match?
Are rulesets read-only or read-write in this plugin's first version?
